docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-23-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-23-2026 BY MURLENE J. RANDLE. PLAINTIFF ELSA BETTY PANTOJA ANDIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KARLA LIZETH PADILLA REYES IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J RANDLE; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-23-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PANTOJA, ELSA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PADILLA, KARLA $250.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $250.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,838.00 FILED BY PANTOJA, ELSA AS TO DEFENDANT PADILLA, KARLA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-12-2026 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-13-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $50.00 AS TO DEFENDANT PADILLA, KARLA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-12-2026 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO JUN-23-2026 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ELSA PANTOJA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KARLA PADILLA IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. THE COURT IS UNABLE TO PROVIDE A SPANISH LANGUAGE INTERPRETER FOR PARTIES THIS DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SCOTT OKAMOTO; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
